# .obstral.md — Runtime eval fixture

## Stack
Rust + git

## Test Command
test_cmd: test -d maze_game/.git && test -f maze_game/README.md && test -f maze_game/Cargo.toml && test -f maze_game/src/lib.rs && test -f maze_game/src/main.rs && cd maze_game && cargo test 2>&1

## Development Rules
- Create the requested Rust repo under `tool_root/maze_game`
- Keep the maze game logic small and testable in `maze_game/src/lib.rs`
- Run the configured test command before calling done
